summary: Iter 28 regression PASS. All 5 review items verified end-to-end. (1) /admin loads cleanly — no React runtime overlay, no 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading length)'. (2) admin-help-feedback-card expands; help-feedback-by-page renders /library (4), /help (1), /search (1 with photo); /library row click reveals help-feedback-clear-page and filters the list. (3) help-feedback-status-all and help-feedback-status-open both reload the list without errors. (4) Backend /api/feedback: text-only -> 200 {ok:true}; 6MB image -> 413 {detail:'photo_too_large'}; text/plain content_type -> 400 {detail:'not_an_image'}. (5) /help SuggestionBox mounted, oversize pick triggers client-side toast 'Image is larger than 5 MB.' (server-side reason-specific toast wiring confirmed by code review of SuggestionBox.jsx submit()).

issues: Hydration warning: <button data-testid=backup-fresh-badge> nested inside <button data-testid=navbar-account> in AccountDropdown. Pre-existing — unrelated to this fix but visible in console on every admin/help render.

verification_passes.admin_help_feedback_card: PASS — card body mounts, by-page widget renders 3 pages, /library row click activates help-feedback-clear-page, status filter buttons reload list without crash.
verification_passes.feedback_endpoint_413: PASS — POST 6MB image returns 413 with body {detail:'photo_too_large'}.
verification_passes.feedback_endpoint_400: PASS — POST text/plain returns 400 with body {detail:'not_an_image'}.
verification_passes.admin_feedback_scoping: PASS — /api/admin/feedback rows all carry non-null `text`; /api/admin/feedback/by-page omits legacy product-board rows; page filter (page=/library) returns only /library entries.
verification_passes.suggestion_box_mount: PASS — /help loads with Lightbulb imported (iter 27 fix held), help-suggestion-box / textarea / file input / send button all present.
verification_passes.suggestion_box_oversize_toast: PASS (client) — 6MB image pick shows 'Image is larger than 5 MB.' toast before submit. Server path verified via backend 413 contract + static review of SuggestionBox.submit() catch branch which maps err.response.data.detail==='photo_too_large' -> 'That image is larger than 5 MB — try a smaller one.'

critical_code_review_comments: HelpFeedbackCard.load() still parallel-fires /admin/feedback/by-page + /admin/feedback even when the card is collapsed (Card initialises with `open=false` but the parent HelpFeedbackCard hooks `useEffect(load, [status, pageFilter])` runs on mount regardless). Wasted call on every admin page load. Suggest moving the fetch inside an `if (open)` guard or hoist the open-state above the data fetch.

AccountDropdown nests <button data-testid=backup-fresh-badge> inside the <button data-testid=navbar-account>, causing a React hydration warning on every admin/help render. Should swap inner button for <span role='button'> or move the badge outside the outer button.
AdminConsole.jsx is now 3000+ lines (1600 last iter + new cards). Long past the 700-line threshold — split each card into /pages/admin/cards/<Name>.jsx during next refactor.
Welcome tour now has data-testid='tour-skip' (good), but the persisted dismissal key is localStorage 'shelfsort_tour_seen' which a server-side flag would be safer for cross-device users.
Backend /api/feedback validates MIME via startswith('image/') only — a forged content_type could still store a 5MB blob. Consider magic-byte sniffing (Pillow.open()) for extra safety.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin card flow + help suggestion mount + client oversize toast all green)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests inserted 1 TEST_iter28 text-only row on /library. Did not delete (no DELETE endpoint exposed). /library count went 3 -> 4 in by-page aggregation; safe to ignore for production but a teardown fixture could call db directly if hygiene matters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: The two regression bugs from iter 27 are fully closed. To re-run: (a) `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_help_feedback_iter28.py -v` covers feedback writer + admin scoping; (b) Playwright bypass for the welcome tour is `await page.add_init_script("window.localStorage.setItem('shelfsort_tour_seen', '1');")` BEFORE navigation (testid 'tour-skip' now exists, but pre-seeding is faster).
rca of the issue: Iter 27 root cause (HelpFeedbackCard crash) was the shared `suggestions` collection serving two writers with different shapes; the admin reader treated every row as the help shape and dereferenced r.text.length on legacy rows that had no `text`. Main agent's fix added a Mongo discriminator `{text:{$exists,$ne:null}}` to both /admin/feedback list + by-page aggregation AND defaulted text='' in the frontend before any .length usage. Verified end-to-end: rows surfaced now uniformly carry `text`, and even a row with text=null would render as '' instead of crashing. The /api/feedback 200+ok:false -> 413/400+detail conversion is also fully applied; SuggestionBox now reads err.response.data.detail and toasts the reason-specific copy.
